# @pagesmith/core

Version-matched AI context for the installed `@pagesmith/core` package.

## Install

```bash
npm add @pagesmith/core
```

## Use this package when

- You need a custom content architecture, custom layouts, or framework-specific rendering.
- You want typed content collections with explicit schemas and runtime control.

## Start here

- **Full API reference:** `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/REFERENCE.md`
- **Agent rules + prompts:** `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/usage.md`
- **Step-by-step recipes:** `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/recipes.md`

## Requirements

- **Node.js 24+** (`engines.node` in package.json).

## Content layer snapshot

- **`ContentLayerConfig`** (via `defineConfig`): `collections`, optional `root`, `markdown`, `assets`, `plugins`, and optional **`strict`** (throw on load errors). There is no top-level `cache` or `eager` field on this config.
- **`defineCollections({ ... })`** — helper to build the `collections` map in one call (same as registering multiple `defineCollection` defs).
- **`ContentLayer`** methods include: `getCollection`, `getEntry`, `convert`, `invalidate` / `invalidateCollection` / `invalidateAll`, `validate`, `getCollectionNames`, `getCollectionDef`, `getCollections`, `invalidateWhere`, `watch`, `getCacheStats`.

## CLI

The **`pagesmith`** CLI (init, dev, build, preview, mcp, etc.) ships with **`@pagesmith/docs`**, not `@pagesmith/core`.

## All guidance files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/REFERENCE.md` | Complete API: content layer, collections, loaders, markdown, JSX, CSS, Vite plugins |
| `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/README.md` | User-facing quick start and API overview |
| `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/usage.md` | Agent rules, integration shape, copy-paste prompts |
| `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/recipes.md` | Task-specific step-by-step recipes |
| `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/errors.md` | Error catalog with patterns and fixes |
| `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/migration.md` | Pre-1.0 upgrade notes |
| `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/changelog-notes.md` | Version highlights |
| `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/AGENTS.md.template` | Template for project-level AGENTS.md |

## Project memory pointer

In the consuming project, add this to `CLAUDE.md` or `AGENTS.md`:

```
For @pagesmith/core usage and prompts, read node_modules/@pagesmith/core/docs/agents/usage.md
For the full @pagesmith/core API reference, see node_modules/@pagesmith/core/REFERENCE.md
```

## Related package

- Docs reference: `node_modules/@pagesmith/docs/REFERENCE.md`
- Docs usage: `node_modules/@pagesmith/docs/docs/agents/usage.md`

## Recent changes

- `ValidationIssue` now includes an optional `source` field (`'schema' | 'content' | 'plugin' | 'custom'`) to identify which validation phase produced the issue.
- New `core_search_entries` MCP tool: search entries across collections by title, description, tags, and slug (case-insensitive, max 20 results).
- `@pagesmith/core/mcp` now exports shared MCP utilities (`getPackageVersion`, `resolvePackageDocPath`, `asTextResource`) alongside the server factory.
- Error catalog added at `agents/errors.md` with machine-readable patterns and fixes for schema, content, plugin, load, and MCP errors.
